# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: vnet-threetier-dev
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Network
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.0.0/16
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the Virtual Network
  webSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: snet-web
    metadata:
      description: Name of the web tier subnet
  webSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.1.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the web tier subnet
  appSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: snet-app
    metadata:
      description: Name of the application tier subnet
  appSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.2.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the application tier subnet
  dbSubnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: snet-db
    metadata:
      description: Name of the database tier subnet
  dbSubnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.3.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the database tier subnet
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    metadata:
      description: Environment name for tagging

variables:
  webNsgName: "[concat('nsg-', parameters('webSubnetName'))]"
  appNsgName: "[concat('nsg-', parameters('appSubnetName'))]"
  dbNsgName: "[concat('nsg-', parameters('dbSubnetName'))]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('webNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: web
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-HTTPS-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            description: Allow HTTPS traffic from Internet to web tier
        - name: Allow-HTTP-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            description: Allow HTTP traffic from Internet to web tier (redirect to HTTPS)
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic
        - name: Allow-Web-To-App-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "8443"
            description: Allow web tier to communicate with app tier on port 8443
        - name: Allow-AzureLoadBalancer-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 90
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: AzureLoadBalancer
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Allow Azure Load Balancer health probes
        - name: Deny-Web-To-DB-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny direct access from web tier to database tier

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('appNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: app
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-Web-To-App-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "8443"
            description: Allow inbound from web tier on port 8443
        - name: Deny-Internet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all direct Internet inbound to app tier
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic
        - name: Allow-App-To-DB-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
            description: Allow app tier to communicate with database tier on SQL port
        - name: Allow-App-To-DB-PostgreSQL-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "5432"
            description: Allow app tier to communicate with database tier on PostgreSQL port
        - name: Deny-App-To-Internet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny direct outbound Internet access from app tier

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('dbNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      tier: database
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-App-To-DB-SQL-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
            description: Allow inbound SQL traffic from app tier only
        - name: Allow-App-To-DB-PostgreSQL-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "5432"
            description: Allow inbound PostgreSQL traffic from app tier only
        - name: Deny-Web-To-DB-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Explicitly deny web tier access to database tier
        - name: Deny-Internet-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 300
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all Internet inbound to database tier
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic
        - name: Deny-DB-To-Internet-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 4000
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: Internet
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all outbound Internet access from database tier
        - name: Deny-DB-To-Web-Outbound
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Outbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny database tier from reaching web tier

  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      architecture: three-tier
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('dbNsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      encryption:
        enabled: true
        enforcement: AllowUnencrypted
      subnets:
        - name: "[parameters('webSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('webSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            defaultOutboundAccess: false
        - name: "[parameters('appSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('appSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            defaultOutboundAccess: false
        - name: "[parameters('dbSubnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('dbNsgName'))]"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            privateLinkServiceNetworkPolicies: Enabled
            defaultOutboundAccess: false

outputs:
  vnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  vnetName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
  webSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('webSubnetName'))]"
  appSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('appSubnetName'))]"
  dbSubnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('dbSubnetName'))]"
  webNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('webNsgName'))]"
  appNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('appNsgName'))]"
  dbNsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('dbNsgName'))]"
